weapon_prompt.title: WHAT DID YOU BRING?
weapon_prompt.subtitle: You can pick from the suggestions or write your own.

options.label: SWORD
options.fail_line: The blade shatters on a coffee table on your way in. Try again.

options.label: BOOK
options.fail_line: You can barely lift it. The corners hurt your fingers more than they hurt anyone else. Try again.

options.label: COFFEE MUG
options.fail_line: Hot. It is so hot. You're the one taking damage. Try again.

door_floor_1.title: THE DOOR.
door_floor_1.subtitle: The Tenant is on the other side. They sound annoyed.

options.label: KICK DOWN
options.fail_line: The door opens outward. You bounce. Embarrassing.

options.label: KNOCK POLITELY
options.fail_line: From inside: "Go away. I'm watching my show."

options.label: FOOL!
options.fail_line: Nothing happens. You said it out loud. Why did you say it out loud.

options.label: OPEN IT
options.fail_line: Just leftovers. Some of them blink.

options.label: KICK IT
options.fail_line: Your toe regrets this. The fridge does not.

door_floor_2.title: THE CONFERENCE ROOM.
door_floor_2.subtitle: The Manager has scheduled this. There is a clipboard.

options.label: BOOK 30 MIN
options.fail_line: The room is already booked. Recurring. You are not on the invite.

options.label: ASK NICELY
options.fail_line: "I'll get back to you." They will not.

options.label: SLIP IN
options.fail_line: Door is glass. They saw. They wave you back into the hall.

printer_f2.title: THE PRINTER.
printer_f2.subtitle: A red light blinks at you confidently.

options.label: PRESS THE BUTTONS
options.fail_line: It prints one beige page of nothing. Then another. Then a third.

options.label: OPEN A TRAY
options.fail_line: There is a sandwich in there. Don't ask.

door_floor_3.title: THE STOREFRONT.
door_floor_3.subtitle: The Algorithm has your route plotted on the door.

options.label: FOLLOW ARROW
options.fail_line: The arrow points back where you came from. Loops you twice.

options.label: IGNORE IT
options.fail_line: The arrow updates. It is patient. It will wait.

options.label: OPT OUT
options.fail_line: "Are you sure? We don't recommend it." You clicked NO. It is loading.

phone_f3.title: THE PHONE.
phone_f3.subtitle: It is ringing. There is no caller.

options.label: ANSWER
options.fail_line: Music on hold. Slightly off-key. You don't recognize the song.

options.label: REJECT
options.fail_line: It rings again immediately. Different ringtone this time.

door_floor_4.title: THE WINDOW.
door_floor_4.subtitle: It's not a door. It's a window. You can see yourself in it.

options.label: CLOSE IT
options.fail_line: X button is greyed out. There's a tooltip you can't read.

options.label: MINIMIZE
options.fail_line: It comes right back. Always on top.

options.label: QUIT
options.fail_line: "Are you sure?" the dialog asks. You haven't said anything yet.

glitch_f4.title: THE TITLE BAR.
glitch_f4.subtitle: Something is being typed in it.

options.label: READ IT
options.fail_line: "--saving--" it says. The save flag is still down.
